channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Brush Fire in Simi Valley Destroys Structure, Forces Evacuations
item.description: A rapidly spreading brush fire, named the Sandy Fire, broke out in Simi Valley, California, before 11 a.m. on Monday, May 18, 2026. Driven by dry conditions and light gusty winds, the fire quickly exp...

item.title: Slipknot’s Lost Experimental Album ‘Look Outside Your Window’ Receives Full Physical Release
item.description: Slipknot has officially announced the full physical release of their previously unreleased experimental album, ‘Look Outside Your Window’, nearly two decades after it was recorded. Originally created ...

item.title: Ryanair urges suspension of EU passport control system amid long airport queues
item.description: Ryanair has strongly criticized the European Union and French authorities over the implementation of the EU Entry/Exit System (EES), which began on April 10. The airline claims the rollout has been po...

item.title: Trump Withdraws $10-Billion Lawsuit Over IRS Tax Return Leak Amid Proposed Compensation Fund
item.description: President Donald Trump has withdrawn his US$10-billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service concerning the leak of his tax returns. The lawsuit, filed earlier this year in Florida, cited reput...

item.title: Fraud Threatens Mobile Money Agents Across Tanzania
item.description: Mobile money agency business in Tanzania is booming, especially among young people, but agents are facing a serious rise in fraud cases. Many agents have lost millions of shillings as fraudsters use i...

item.title: Rural Food Inequality in the Cotswolds: Challenges of Access and Cost
item.description: The Cotswolds, often celebrated for its picturesque villages and affluence, is facing a hidden issue: rural food deserts. Villages such as Kempsford, while visually charming, lack nearby food stores, ...

item.title: Artscape marks 55 years with programmes promoting accessibility and community engagement
item.description: Artscape Theatre Centre in Cape Town is marking its 55th anniversary with a programme focused on transformation, inclusivity, and community engagement. Originally opened in 1971 as the Nico Malan Thea...

item.title: Spanish court orders tax authority to repay Shakira over €55 million after ruling she was not a tax resident in 2011
item.description: A Spanish national high court has ruled in favour of singer Shakira, ordering the country’s tax authority to repay more than €55 million plus interest. The court determined that tax officials failed t...

item.title: Filipino Girl Group BINI Recognized by House for Landmark Coachella Performance
item.description: The all-female Filipino pop group BINI has been officially recognized by the Philippine House of Representatives for their historic performance at the Coachella music festival. This recognition celebr...

item.title: Key Changes and Highlights of the FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is set to be the largest tournament in history, spanning three countries – the United States, Canada and Mexico – and featuring a record 48 teams. The event will take place acr...

item.title: BJP Leader R. Ashok Questions Karnataka Congress Government's Moral Right to Celebrate Third Anniversary Amid Rising Farmers' Suicides
item.description: Bengaluru: Senior BJP leader and Leader of Opposition in Karnataka Legislative Assembly, R. Ashok, has strongly criticised the Congress government stating that it has no moral right to organise a cele...

item.title: Constitutional Court strikes down health minister’s control over doctors’ practice locations
item.description: The Constitutional Court has struck down provisions in the National Health Act that would have allowed the health minister to control where doctors and other healthcare professionals could practise, a...

item.title: Pakistan condemns drone attacks on Saudi Arabia and reiterates support for regional peace
item.description: On Monday, Pakistan officially condemned the drone strikes targeting Saudi Arabia, expressing strong solidarity with Riyadh. According to Saudi Arabia's Defence Ministry, three drones originating from...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Dies After Being Attacked Over Tattoo of President Ruto
item.description: A Kenyan woman, Rachel Wandeto, has tragically died at Kenyatta National Hospital after suffering severe burns from an attack allegedly linked to a tattoo of President William Ruto on her shoulder. Re...

item.title: Joan Bennett's Early Career and Iconic Style in the 1920s
item.description: Joan Geraldine Bennett (1910–1990) was an American actress who began her career on stage before becoming a prominent film star. In the late 1920s, Bennett transitioned from a youthful stage ingénue to...

item.title: Bodies of Four Italian Divers Recovered Following Maldives Cave Accident
item.description: A specialist search team has recovered the bodies of four Italian divers who tragically died in an underwater cave accident in the Maldives’ Vaavu Atoll. The divers, part of a group of five, were expl...

item.title: Lagos Govt Raises Alarm Over 16 Million Prank Calls Clogging Emergency Hotlines
item.description: The Lagos State Government don warn residents make dem stop di plenty prank and fake calls wey dem dey put for emergency hotlines. According to di Commissioner for Special Duties, Olugbenga Oyerinde, ...

item.title: First Impressions of Googlebook Laptops Raise Questions About Their Purpose
item.description: Google recently revealed its new laptop initiative, 'Googlebook,' during 'The Android Show,' which merges Android and ChromeOS with Gemini AI integrated features. The keynote highlighted a few new fun...

item.title: Collection of Editorial Cartoons for May 19, 2026
item.description: The article provides a compilation of notable editorial cartoons published up to May 19, 2026. While it primarily serves as a visual roundup rather than a traditional news story, the feature highlight...

item.title: Iran shares updated peace proposal with US amid stalled negotiations
item.description: On Monday, Pakistan confirmed that it had shared a revised peace proposal from Iran with the United States, aimed at ending the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Sources indicate that talks are sti...
